title: SignalR Event Normalization
description: Create DashboardHubEvents static class with SnapshotUpdated, GoalUpdated, ChatReceived constants. Fix SignalR event drift: remove initSignalR(), keep connectSignalR() only. Normalize StatusUpdated/StatusUpdate/GoalUpdate to single SnapshotUpdated event in wwwroot/index.html. Reference: blazor-dashboard-improvement-v2.md Sections 6-7
